title: Horse Speed Changer
description: Change the speed of any horse that you can ride!
body:
# Horse Speed Changer

## For support please join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/veRHdAQj5w)

### Version 1.20.1

Press the **Z** Key to slow down the Horses speed by 2%
Press the **X** Key to increase the Horses speed by 2%
